parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
!pragma handwritten true
skinparam backgroundColor #F0EBE1
skinparam sequence {
    ArrowColor #00BFFF
    LifeLineBorderColor #000000
    LifeLineBackgroundColor #B0E0E6
    ParticipantBorderColor #000000
    ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
    ActorBorderColor #00BFFF
    ActorBackgroundColor #00BFFF
    ActorFontColor #00BFFF
}

title <u>借出图书</u> 用例

actor 图书管理员 as Admin
boundary 账号判断 as AccountCheck
control 业务控制 as BusinessControl
database 数据库 as Database

group 读者账号合法性验证
    Admin -[#00BFFF]> AccountCheck : **1** 输入读者账号信息
    activate AccountCheck
    AccountCheck -[#00BFFF]> BusinessControl : **2** 获取账号信息
    deactivate AccountCheck
    activate BusinessControl
    BusinessControl -[#00BFFF]> Database : **3** 比对账号密码合法性
    activate Database
    Database --[#00BFFF]> BusinessControl : **4** 账号合法
end

group 借出图书
    Admin -[#00BFFF]> BusinessControl : **5** 输入借出图书信息
    BusinessControl -[#00BFFF]> Database : **6** 增加借阅信息
    BusinessControl -[#00BFFF]> Database : **7** 修改图书库存
    Database -[#00BFFF]> BusinessControl : **8** 返回操作结果
    deactivate Database
    BusinessControl -[#00BFFF]> Admin : **9** 返回借出结果
    deactivate BusinessControl
end

@enduml
```
